content.query:
--CREATE CREDITENTIAL

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL saicreds

WITH
IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

---CREATE EXTERNAL SOURCE

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE raw_ext_source

WITH
(             
    LOCATION = 'https://gen2datalake.dfs.core.windows.net/raw',
    CREDENTIAL = saicreds
)
----dedicated path
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE raw_ext_source_abfss

WITH
(             
    LOCATION = 'abfss://raw@gen2datalake.dfs.core.windows.net',
    CREDENTIAL = saicreds
)
-----CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT 
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csv_formatt
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
      FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
      ENCODING = 'UTF8' )
);
----CREATE PARQET FORMAT 

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH (  
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET, 
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
    );   


---open row set

 select * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'revenue2',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'raw_ext_source',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS QUERY
